race.comment: TRADEWORX (7) returned to his best with a dominant victory at Wodonga, putting a handy margin on his rivals over a similar trip. He is normally much better on the poly surface here, and he can repeat the dose. TRIPLE OH (11) has won her only race here, and from a good draw, there is a chance of a big form reversal in a very thin field. JAZ TYCOON (2) has won his only start on this course, and his recent form has turned a corner. Each way. GRUNNETTAN (9) is struggling to find his best, and gets another chance over a middle distance for the first time this year. John Allen picks up the ride, and he is not the worst here at Bolter's odds. ALL IN VAIN (13) has found it hard to win another race, so he is in the right race here. He saves his best for this track, and he can figure in the top 3 with the blinkers off for the first time.
